pain_points.title: The reality no one tells you
pain_points.traditional_desc: R$ 1,500/mo in ads + 10h/week creating content. Cost per client: R$ 750.
pain_points.with_2pets_desc: R$ 99/mo fixed. 0h/week in marketing. Pet owners find you when they need. Cost per client: R$ 10.
